description: Discussion on building HeavenDex, addressing memecoins, and insights from Pasternak and others.
topic_summary: The podcast features a conversation about the development of HeavenDex, the challenges of memecoins, and the contributions of various individuals in the crypto space. The hosts engage in a dynamic dialogue, sharing experiences and insights from their journeys in crypto, particularly focusing on the degen side of the industry [t=142:95].
